body.value: 藩制一覧表第九
藩制一覧表 第九（はんせいいちらん だいきゅう）

Outer-margin running header — 'Domain-System Survey, Fascicle 9', the ninth (final) fascicle, which is the officials-and-military register (職員兵隊). Provenance marker in the outer margin, not page data; it names Hiroshima even though the data immediately to its left (right of the ○廣島藩 marker) belongs to the preceding domain, Shizuku. Ink bbox x4803-4912, y2621-3805.
藩制一覧表第九（廣島）
（廣島）
（広島＝ひろしま）
Parenthetical domain gloss appended below the fascicle header, identifying the section as Hiroshima. Faint grey ink at x4785-4899, y3478-3793.
（廣島）
四百六十
四百六十（460）
Printed page number in the bottom margin: 460. Kanji numerals 四百六十; ink bbox x4755-4870, y6418-6894. Page furniture, not data.
book_page 四百六十
権大参事
権大参事（ごんだいさんじ）

Rank heading — Provisional Senior Councillor (gon-daisanji), second tier of the domain councillor ladder (大参事→権大参事→少参事→権少参事). This column stands to the RIGHT of the ○廣島藩 marker, so per the boundary rule it belongs to the PREVIOUS domain, Shizuku (志筑藩). Heading ink x4521-4668, y2436-2741; the appointee's name follows below.
権大参事（志筑）
馬場権大参事　源宗　寅
馬場権大参事（ばば ごんだいさんじ）／源宗（みなもとの むね）・寅（とら）

Shizuku's Provisional Senior Councillor, Baba (馬場), with his formal court style in small print: the imperial-clan name Minamoto no Mune (源宗) and the azana / childhood name Tora (寅). Reads 馬場権大参事 followed by 源宗 and 寅. Belongs to Shizuku domain (right of the ○廣島藩 marker). Name+courtname ink roughly x4515-4675, y3400-4789.
馬場権大参事 源宗（寅）（志筑）
少参事
少参事（しょうさんじ）

Rank heading — Junior Councillor (shō-sanji), third councillor tier. Column stands right of the ○廣島藩 marker and so belongs to the PREVIOUS domain, Shizuku (志筑藩). Heading ink x4230-4374, y2400-2741; two named appointees follow below.
少参事（志筑）
金井少参事　源義　文　／　西田少参事　藤原保清
金井少参事（かない しょうさんじ）／源義（みなもとの よし）・文（ぶん）　／　西田少参事（にしだ しょうさんじ）／藤原保清（ふじわらの やすきよ）

Shizuku's two Junior Councillors, listed top-to-bottom: Kanai (金井少参事) with court style Minamoto no Yoshi (源義) and azana Bun (文), then Nishida (西田少参事) with court style Fujiwara no Yasukiyo (藤原保清). Belongs to Shizuku domain (right of the ○廣島藩 marker). Column ink x4180-4377, running from the heading down to y~6990.
金井少参事 源義（文）／西田少参事 藤原保清（志筑）
常備兵　一小隊　但四十人役司八人
常備兵（じょうびへい）一小隊（いちしょうたい）。ただし四十人、役司（やくし）八人

Standing troops (jōbihei): 1 platoon (一小隊), noted in small print as 40 men (四十人) plus 8 staff officers (役司八人). Belongs to the PREVIOUS domain, Shizuku (right of the ○廣島藩 marker) — its tiny force marks it as a very small (~8,000-koku) domain. Column ink x3942-4087, y2425-4410.
常備兵（志筑）
非常兵　二小隊　同斷
非常兵（ひじょうへい）二小隊（にしょうたい）、同断（どうだん＝上に同じ）

Emergency / reserve troops (hijōhei): 2 platoons (二小隊), with 同斷 ('same as above') indicating the same per-platoon establishment as the standing troops. Belongs to Shizuku domain (right of the ○廣島藩 marker). Column ink x3657-3808, y2430-3693.
非常兵（志筑）
○廣島藩
○広島藩（ひろしまはん）

Domain-boundary marker opening the Hiroshima entry: a maru (○) followed by 廣島藩 read top-to-bottom. Everything to its LEFT is Hiroshima's data; everything to its RIGHT (read earlier) belongs to the preceding domain, Shizuku. Marker ink x3352-3539, y2775-3916.
○廣島藩
大参事　二人
大参事（だいさんじ）二人（ににん）

Hiroshima rank heading and establishment count — Senior Councillor (daisanji): 2 persons. Top councillor tier. Heading+count ink x3102-3245, y2417-3247; the two appointee names appear below in the same column.
大参事
石井正敏　神田直養
石井正敏（いしい まさとし）・神田直養（かんだ なおよし）

The two Senior Councillors (大参事) of Hiroshima, read top-to-bottom in the column below the 二人 count: Ishii Masatoshi (石井正敏) and Kanda Naoyoshi (神田直養). Matches the 二人 establishment. Column ink x3057-3216, y4178-6936.
大参事 appointees 石井正敏・神田直養
権大参事　一人　外三人　人撰中
権大参事（ごんだいさんじ）一人（いちにん）、外（ほか）三人、人撰中（じんせんちゅう＝選定中）

Hiroshima rank heading and count — Provisional Senior Councillor (gon-daisanji): 1 person seated, with a further 3 (外三人) noted as 人撰中, i.e. still under selection / not yet appointed. The single seated appointee (Nishimura Masatomo 西村正倫) is named lower in the adjacent name register. Heading+count ink x2817-2966, y2421-4112.
権大参事
少参事　四人
少参事（しょうさんじ）四人（よにん）

Hiroshima rank heading and establishment count — Junior Councillor (shō-sanji): 4 persons. Third councillor tier. Heading+count ink x2536-2680, y2417-3252; appointee names follow in the roster columns to the left.
少参事
久保田秀雄　伴資健
久保田秀雄（くぼた ひでお）・伴資健（ばん すけかつ）

A name-register column of Hiroshima councillor appointees, read top-to-bottom: Kubota Hideo (久保田秀雄) and Ban Sukekatsu (伴資健). These fill the councillor rosters left of the ○廣島藩 marker (少参事/権少参事 tiers). Column ink x2500-2662, y4174-6867.
少参事 appointees 久保田秀雄・伴資健
寺川行從　寺田高徳
寺川行従（てらがわ ゆきより）・寺田高徳（てらだ たかのり）

A further name-register column of Hiroshima councillor appointees, read top-to-bottom: Teragawa Yukiyori (寺川行從) and Terada Takanori (寺田高徳). Part of Hiroshima's 少参事/権少参事 roster. Column ink x2230-2372, y4172-6931.
councillor appointees 寺川行從・寺田高徳
権少参事　四人　三人
権少参事（ごんしょうさんじ）四人（よにん）〔三人（さんにん）〕

Hiroshima rank heading and count — Provisional Junior Councillor (gon-shō-sanji): 4 persons (四人), with a smaller supplementary 三人 printed in the adjacent sub-column (paralleling the 権大参事 '外三人' note; likely 3 currently seated or 3 additional). Bottom councillor tier. Heading+count ink x1930-2126, y2413-3264.
権少参事
小川忠順　谷口眞卿
小川忠順（おがわ ただより）・谷口眞卿（たにぐち まさあきら）

A name-register column of Hiroshima councillor appointees, read top-to-bottom: Ogawa Tadayori (小川忠順) and Taniguchi Masaakira (谷口眞卿). Part of Hiroshima's councillor roster. Column ink x1960-2097, y4172-6933.
councillor appointees 小川忠順・谷口眞卿
武非澄
武非澄（たけ・ひ・すみ／読み不確定）

The leftmost Hiroshima councillor-appointee name, read top-to-bottom: 武非澄 (three characters 武・非・澄; middle glyph verified as 非, not 井). Reading of this uncommon personal name is uncertain. Column ink x1690-1812, y4161-5341.
councillor appointee 武非澄
兵員　六千人
兵員（へいいん）六千人（ろくせんにん）
Hiroshima military strength — total personnel (heiin): 6,000 men (六千人). Matches MASTER's parsed 6000 persons. Column ink x1417-1555, y2590-4635.
兵員
此拾大隊　二大隊士族　八大隊卒族
此（これ）拾大隊（じゅうだいたい）。二大隊は士族（しぞく）、八大隊は卒族（そつぞく）

Breakdown of Hiroshima's 6,000 troops — 'these [comprise] ten battalions (拾大隊)': 2 battalions of shizoku (二大隊士族) and 8 battalions of sotsuzoku (八大隊卒族). Confirms MASTER's raw string. Column ink x1081-1301, y2400-3856.
大隊
